description: Radio Farda (Radio Tomorrow) is a Persian-language radio station operated by [Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty](/orgs/radio-free-europe-radio-liberty) (RFE/RL), headquartered in Prague. Launched in 2002, it is funded by the US Congress through the [US Agency for Global Media](/orgs/us-agency-for-global-media) with an annual budget of approximately $7–8 million. Radio Farda broadcasts 24/7 radio programming and maintains a significant online presence, covering Iranian politics, human rights, and cultural affairs. The Iranian regime considers Radio Farda hostile and routinely jams its broadcasts.
editorial_notes: RFE/RL subsidiary. US-funded. HQ in Prague.
